description_long: This shampoo container is a rectangular box with a modern, geometric design featuring bold color blocks in green, orange, pink, and blue. The front face displays the product name 'DST' in large orange letters, with the numbers '4 9 7' vertically aligned below, and the words 'SHOWER CLEANER' and '500 gr. 100% ORGANIC' in smaller text. A vertical black-striped graphic is present on the left side of the front face, adding a distinctive visual element. The top and sides of the box continue the color-block motif, with horizontal bands of orange, pink, and green. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and visually striking, with no visible dispensing mechanism or traditional bottle shape. The box appears to be made of sturdy cardboard or coated paperboard, suitable for containing powdered or solid shampoo.
description: A rectangular, color-blocked shampoo box with bold graphics and modern design elements, featuring prominent text and a striped motif.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'DST' branding, vertical numbers, product description, and a black-striped graphic on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical alignment of the numbers and the continuation of the color bands, with minimal text.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, with the same branding, numbers, and graphics visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with vertical numbers and color bands, but no black-striped graphic.
attribute_brand_logo: DST in large orange letters on the front face.
attribute_label_text: DST 4 9 7 SHOWER CLEANER 500 gr. 100% ORGANIC MADE IN GREECE
attribute_bottle_silhouette: rectangular box with flat top and sides
attribute_packaging_graphics: Vertical black-striped motif on the front left, bold color blocks and horizontal bands in orange, pink, and green.
